chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D–1880 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of Case For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.08.2024 Raja Zeeshan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zahid Hussain Baladi, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. A reply on behalf of respondent No.3 National Accountability Bureau has been filed and is taken on record. In view of a letter disclosed therein the anticipated action has been taken and in consequence thereof this petition is not pressed and is dismissed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
